task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is used for the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data panel or active dataset indicator shows 'Sample Order Lines' as the loaded and selected dataset.

task_completion.description: Verify a line chart is created with 'Order Date' on the X-axis and 'Sales' on the Y-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line chart visualization is visible on the canvas. The grammar/properties panel shows 'Order Date' assigned to the Category (X-axis) and 'Sales' assigned to the Values (Y-axis).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Order Date' is set to Month/Year granularity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The X-axis labels display dates in a Month/Year format (e.g., Jan 2023), or the grammar panel explicitly shows the 'Order Date' field configured to a Month/Year hierarchy level.

task_completion.description: Verify a moving average trend line is added to the line chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A secondary line representing the moving average is visible overlaid on the main sales line chart, and the analytics/properties panel shows that a 'Trend Line' or 'Moving Average' has been enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the moving average period is configured to 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties panel for the moving average/trend line explicitly shows the 'Period', 'Interval', or 'Length' setting configured to the number '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved as 'Sales_Trend_Analysis' in My Folders/Documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar displays 'Sales_Trend_Analysis', or a save dialog/catalog view shows the file 'Sales_Trend_Analysis' (or .dva) successfully saved in the 'My Folders/Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the BI tool's graphical user interface to build the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with drag-and-drop menus, property panels, and the visual canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart contains standard BI tool UI elements (like selection handles, axis titles, or tooltips) and is not an imported static image or manually drawn mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not fake the output using text boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trend line and axes are actual data-driven visual elements configured via the analytics panel, not text annotations or shapes manually placed to look like a chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected dataset is 'Sample Order Lines'. The visualization must be a Line Chart with 'Order Date' (Month/Year granularity) on the X-axis and 'Sales' on the Y-axis. A Moving Average trend line must be present and its period must be explicitly set to 3. The final workbook must be saved as 'Sales_Trend_Analysis.dva' in My Folders/Documents.
